TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Puljetji i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Puljetji. u kasalumaluma' nu Puljetji sa, 138 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 456 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 447 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 9 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 94%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: pur~…ĺj…ôtji i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôtji. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôtji sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Puljetji i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Puljetji. u kasalumaluma' nu Puljetji sa, 138 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 456 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 447 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 9 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 94%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: pur~…ĺj…ôtji i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôtji. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pur~…ĺj…ôtji sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
